title: Andy Hodgson
description: English television presenter and teleshopping auctioneer
extract:
Andrew Simon Hodgson (born (1972-03-02)2 March 1972) is an English television presenter and teleshopping auctioneer. He began his auctioneering career as the main host of bid tv from 2000 to 2010, and has since been a presenter on TJC since 2020.
Hodgson has also made other television appearances on shows such as This Morning, and has been heard on Fix Radio. He also provided the voice-over for the majority of the advertising for bid.tv, as well as appearing in-vision for several of them, as well as being a presenter on the late night TV gambling programme Win Cash Live.
